implemented.summary: Auth boot-time enforcement exported through auth module and executed in middleware; auth config tests expanded.
packages/db now exposes migrations:lint and migrations:guard scripts; local migration wrapper scripts added.
Storage signed upload helper now returns signed metadata and uploads/sign forwards signedAt plus expiresInSec.
Voice token endpoint now emits party.voice.token.issued telemetry with unit coverage.
Games telemetry moved to canonical event names while preserving legacy aliases at ingestion.
Existing embed shell and module-open telemetry paths were retained; no new shell component was required.
Runnable GitHub Actions workflow added for install, shipcheck, tests, and artifact upload.
Root layout now emits platform.page_load telemetry and observability notes were added.

residuals: No branches, commits, or PRs were created because the repository already had unrelated local modifications and no GitHub credential flow was available in this run.
The prompt's Playwright/WebRTC smoke and load harness work was not implemented in this pass; see issue drafts.
No new shared telemetry workspace package was extracted; canonicalization was implemented in apps/web to avoid larger cross-workspace churn in a dirty tree.
